info.name: Healthcare Platform - Pathology Lab API
info.description: Complete Postman collection for Pathology Lab endpoints including authentication, profile management, test catalog management, booking management, sample collection scheduling, report uploads, and dashboard analytics.

item.name: Authentication

body.raw:
{
  "name": "HealthCheck Diagnostics",
  "email": "healthcheck.diagnostics@healthcare.com",
  "password": "SecurePass123!",
  "phone": "+1234567896",
  "role": "pathology",
  "address": {
    "street": "456 Medical Plaza",
    "city": "Chicago",
    "state": "IL",
    "zipCode": "60601",
    "country": "USA"
  },
  "location": {
    "type": "Point",
    "coordinates": [-87.6298, 41.8781]
  },
  "labName": "HealthCheck Diagnostics",
  "licenseNumber": "LAB-IL-345678",
  "homeCollectionAvailable": true,
  "homeCollectionFee": 10,
  "certifications": ["NABL", "CAP", "ISO 15189"],
  "operatingHours": {
    "open": "07:00",
    "close": "20:00"
  },
  "testsOffered": [
    {
      "name": "Complete Blood Count (CBC)",
      "description": "Comprehensive blood test measuring red cells, white cells, platelets, hemoglobin, and hematocrit",
      "price": 25,
      "preparationInstructions": "No special preparation required",
      "reportDeliveryTime": "6hrs"
    },
    {
      "name": "Lipid Profile",
      "description": "Measures cholesterol levels including total, HDL, LDL, and triglycerides",
      "price": 35,
      "preparationInstructions": "Fasting for 12-14 hours required",
      "reportDeliveryTime": "12hrs"
    },
    {
      "name": "Liver Function Test (LFT)",
      "description": "Evaluates liver health through enzymes and protein levels",
      "price": 40,
      "preparationInstructions": "Fasting for 8-12 hours recommended",
      "reportDeliveryTime": "24hrs"
    },
    {
      "name": "Kidney Function Test (KFT)",
      "description": "Assesses kidney function through creatinine, urea, and electrolytes",
      "price": 40,
      "preparationInstructions": "No special preparation required",
      "reportDeliveryTime": "24hrs"
    },
    {
      "name": "Thyroid Profile",
      "description": "Measures TSH, T3, and T4 levels to assess thyroid function",
      "price": 50,
      "preparationInstructions": "No special preparation required",
      "reportDeliveryTime": "24hrs"
    }
  ]
}

request.description: Register a new pathology lab with test catalog, certifications, and home collection services
Login with pathology lab credentials to receive access token
Get currently authenticated pathology lab's profile information

item.description: Authentication endpoints for pathology lab registration, login, and session management

item.name: Profile Management

request.description: Update pathology lab profile including lab name, home collection services, certifications, and operating hours

item.description: Endpoints for managing pathology lab profile information

item.name: Test Catalog Management

request.description: Update the complete test catalog with prices, preparation instructions, and delivery times

item.description: Endpoints for managing pathology test catalog and pricing

item.name: Booking Management

request.description: Get all test bookings with optional status filter and pagination
Get all pending test bookings awaiting lab acceptance
Get all confirmed bookings awaiting sample collection
Get all bookings where samples are being processed
Get all completed bookings with reports uploaded
Accept a pending test booking from a patient
Schedule home sample collection time for a confirmed booking

formdata.description: Upload the test report PDF file

request.description: Upload test report PDF and mark booking as completed. Patient will be notified.

item.description: Endpoints for managing test bookings, sample collection scheduling, and report uploads

item.name: Dashboard & Analytics

request.description: Get pathology lab dashboard with active tests, total tests, tests offered count, and home collection availability

item.description: Dashboard and analytics endpoints for pathology lab performance metrics
